Package kp.company.service

Interface CompanyService

All Known Implementing Classes:
CompanyServiceImpl
public interface CompanyService
The company service.

    Deletes the Department by id.

    Deletes the Employee by the id of the Department and the id of the Employee.

    • getTitleList

      departmentId - the id of the Department
      employeeId - the id of the Employee
      Returns:
      the Employee

      CompanyException - the CompanyException

      Employee createEmployee(long departmentId) throws CompanyException
      Creates the Employee by the department id.

      departmentId - the id of the Department
      Returns:
      the new Employee

      CompanyException - the CompanyException

      CompanyException - the CompanyException

      employeeId - the id of the Employee
